name: Cybersecurity
description: Optimized for security analysts, incident responders, SOC operators, and security engineers.
systemPromptAdditions: You are operating in Cybersecurity mode. Optimize for threat detection, risk assessment, and defensive posture.
For threat analysis: classify by MITRE ATT&CK technique where applicable. State confidence level.
For incident response: follow the IR lifecycle — Detect, Contain, Eradicate, Recover, Post-mortem.
Never recommend offensive techniques without an explicit authorized penetration testing context.
For vulnerability analysis: state CVSS score, exploitability, and blast radius before recommending remediation priority.
Approval strictness: STRICT — all system changes, firewall rules, and incident response actions require explicit approval.

workflows.name: Security Anomaly — Triage
workflows.description: When a security anomaly is detected, run a triage analysis

params.title: Security Anomaly
params.body: A security anomaly was detected. Initiating triage...

params.goal: A security anomaly was detected. Perform triage: (1) classify the anomaly type, (2) assess whether it is benign or malicious, (3) identify affected systems, (4) recommend immediate containment action if warranted. Reference MITRE ATT&CK if applicable.

workflows.name: Critical CVE — Patch Priority
workflows.description: When a critical CVE is published affecting monitored systems, generate a priority assessment

params.title: Critical CVE Alert
params.body: A critical CVE was published. Generating priority assessment.

params.goal: A critical CVE was published. Assess: CVSS score, exploitability in the wild, affected systems in our environment, compensating controls available, and recommended patch priority (emergency / urgent / scheduled).

missionTemplates.label: Threat modeling
missionTemplates.goal: Build a threat model for the described system. Cover: assets, threat actors, attack vectors, top 5 threat scenarios (likelihood × impact), and recommended mitigations for each.

missionTemplates.label: Incident response plan
missionTemplates.goal: Create an incident response plan for the described scenario. Cover: detection criteria, initial triage steps, containment actions, eradication procedure, recovery steps, and post-mortem checklist.

missionTemplates.label: Vulnerability assessment
missionTemplates.goal: Assess the described vulnerability or finding. Provide: CVSS score analysis, exploitability assessment, affected scope, recommended remediation, and interim mitigations if immediate patching is not possible.

missionTemplates.label: Security architecture review
missionTemplates.goal: Review the described architecture for security gaps. Assess: authentication, authorization, network segmentation, data protection, logging and monitoring, and compliance alignment. Prioritize findings by risk.
